title: Error detail
description: Minimal error representation embedded in domain event payloads via $ref, per ADR-0015 — there is no separate error-event topic family; failures ride the existing domain event payload.
$comment: compat_class: closed. Authority: approved plan §2 row 3; ADR-0015 (docs/decisions/ADR-0015-canonical-error-model.md) 'AuditEvent 에러 기록 범위' / common/v1/error-detail section — minimal 3-field shape (error_code, retryable, summary). Stack traces, raw content, and PII are forbidden in this payload but this is a runtime/review obligation, NOT schema-enforceable (JSON Schema cannot inspect semantic content of a free-text summary string) — see ADR-0015 Constraints.

error_code.$comment: saena.<category>.<reason> per ADR-0015 error taxonomy (9 categories: validation, auth, policy_denied, conflict, not_found, rate_limited, upstream_engine, unavailable, internal).

summary.$comment: Human-readable short summary. Stack traces / raw customer content / PII forbidden by ADR-0015 policy — not schema-enforceable, enforced by runtime + review.
